ascension.retireOrAscend: Retire and bank everything - or draft a loadout and ascend to depth {{depth}}.
ascension.ascendedLevelsInfo: Ascended levels are faster and count {{multiplier}}× toward Certificate Hours.
ascension.noLoadouts: No loadouts available - loadouts.yml failed to load. You can still retire below.
ascension.tutorialIntro1: You beat every level - but the grind never ends. Ascend to start over at level 1 with your score, upgrades and lives intact, plus one
ascension.tutorialIntro2: : a curse bundled with a blessing. Loadouts stack with every ascension, levels get faster, and each cleared level counts more toward Certificate Hours. Retire whenever you want to bank it all.

bottomBarDetails.ballSpeedDescBase: Effective multiplier on ball velocity. Base: {{base}}
bottomBarDetails.ballSpeedDescMicro_one: . MicroManager applies an additional {{reduction}}% reduction from {{count}} locked ball
bottomBarDetails.ballSpeedDescMicro_other: . MicroManager applies an additional {{reduction}}% reduction from {{count}} locked balls
bottomBarDetails.ballSpeedDescTail: . Slower balls give you more reaction time when drawing fences.
bottomBarDetails.ballSizeDesc: Radius multiplier applied to every ball. Larger balls are harder to dodge when drawing a fence - but also cover more of the board for locking purposes.
bottomBarDetails.fenceSpeedDesc: How quickly your fence grows after you start drawing. Higher fence speed shortens the window a ball has to collide with your in-progress fence, making cuts safer.
bottomBarDetails.scoreMultiplierDesc: Global multiplier applied to all points earned this run. Stacks multiplicatively with per-cut par bonuses.
bottomBarDetails.instantFencesActive_one: {{count}} fence is automatically completed at the start of each level, capturing territory without any risk.
bottomBarDetails.instantFencesActive_other: {{count}} fences are automatically completed at the start of each level, capturing territory without any risk.
bottomBarDetails.instantFencesInactive: No instant fences active. Purchase upgrades to gain free fences each level.
bottomBarDetails.concurrentFencesActive: You can draw {{total}} fences simultaneously. Extra concurrent fences let you cut from multiple walls at once.
bottomBarDetails.concurrentFencesInactive: Default: 1 active fence at a time.
bottomBarDetails.bonusRemovalActive: Each successful cut has a {{chance}} chance to strip {{amount}} of a ball's accumulated speed bonus, gradually nudging fast balls back toward their base speed.
bottomBarDetails.extraLivesActive_one: +{{count}} additional starting live added at the start of every run. More lives means more chances to recover from a bad cut.
bottomBarDetails.extraLivesActive_other: +{{count}} additional starting lives added at the start of every run. More lives means more chances to recover from a bad cut.
bottomBarDetails.runwayInstantFenceActive: While you have {{hours}}h or more banked when a map starts, one fence completes instantly (Runway).
bottomBarDetails.runwayConcurrentFenceActive: While you have {{hours}}h or more banked when a map starts, you can grow one extra fence at a time (Runway).
bottomBarDetails.runwayFreezeActive: While you have {{hours}}h or more banked when a map starts, tapping a ball freezes it for 2 seconds (Runway).
bottomBarDetails.budgetCycleActive: Every {{hours}}h spent in one shop visit charges boons for the next map (max 3 chunks per visit).
bottomBarDetails.extraShopSlotsActive_one: {{count}} extra item appears in the upgrade shop between levels, giving you more choices each visit.
bottomBarDetails.extraShopSlotsActive_other: {{count}} extra items appear in the upgrade shop between levels, giving you more choices each visit.
bottomBarDetails.shopRestocksActive_one: Your first purchase per shop visit each add a fresh offer to the shelf (Procurement).
bottomBarDetails.shopRestocksActive_other: Your first {{count}} purchases per shop visit each add a fresh offer to the shelf (Procurement).
bottomBarDetails.microManagerActive_one: Each locked ball reduces ball speed by {{percent}}% (stacks multiplicatively, down to a 50% floor). Right now {{count}} ball locked → effective speed {{speed}}.
bottomBarDetails.microManagerActive_other: Each locked ball reduces ball speed by {{percent}}% (stacks multiplicatively, down to a 50% floor). Right now {{count}} balls locked → effective speed {{speed}}.
bottomBarDetails.overtimePerLockActive: Each ball you lock away adds +{{hours}} bonus overtime, folded under the map's reward cap (Severance Package).
bottomBarDetails.frozenLockBonusActive: Locking a ball while it is frozen pays x{{mult}} lock bonus (Frozen Assets).
bottomBarDetails.lockThresholdActive: Pockets up to {{percent}}% larger than the lock limit still lock their ball (Code Review).
bottomBarDetails.spawnFreezeActive: Every map boots frozen: all balls hold still for the first {{seconds}}s (Cold Boot).
bottomBarDetails.spawnFreezeInactive: Balls move from the first moment of every map.
bottomBarDetails.pickupChanceActive: Power-up tokens appear more often than usual (Benefits Package).
bottomBarDetails.pickupChanceInactive: Power-up tokens appear at their normal rate.
bottomBarDetails.pickupPayoutActive: Claimed tokens pay out enhanced rewards, and split balls fly slower (Total Compensation level {{level}}).
bottomBarDetails.pickupPayoutInactive: Power-up tokens pay their base rewards.
bottomBarDetails.pushBonusActive: Push-your-luck payouts are multiplied by x{{mult}}.
bottomBarDetails.fenceSpeedPerLockActive: Each ball locked this map speeds up fence generation by {{percent}}% for the rest of the map (Knowledge Transfer).
bottomBarDetails.simultaneousLockBonusActive: Every lock counts as {{count}} ball(s) bigger for the simultaneous-trap multiplier (Chain Reaction set bonus).
bottomBarDetails.freezeNoCooldownActive: Balls can be re-frozen the moment they thaw, no cooldown (Absolute Zero set bonus).
bottomBarDetails.freezeNoCooldownInactive: Frozen balls have a re-freeze cooldown after thawing.
bottomBarDetails.fenceSpeedPerFenceActive: Each fence you complete speeds up the next by {{percent}}% for the rest of the map (Continuous Delivery).
bottomBarDetails.underParInstantFenceActive: Finishing a map under par grants +{{count}} instant fence(s) on the next map (Clean Release).
bottomBarDetails.bankedSlowActive: Balls spawn {{percent}}% slower for every 50h banked at map start, up to 8% (War Chest).
bottomBarDetails.spaceBonusMultiplierActive: Space Optimization bonuses pay x{{mult}} (Tech Evangelist).
bottomBarDetails.overtimeCapBonusActive: The per-map overtime cap is raised by {{hours}}h for the rest of the run (Stock Options).
bottomBarDetails.freeCheapestOfferActive: The cheapest offer in every shop is free (Company Card).
bottomBarDetails.wallShieldsPerMapActive: {{count}} fence hit(s) per map are absorbed without costing a life (Second Wind).
bottomBarDetails.fenceGraceActive: Fences ignore ball hits during their first {{seconds}}s of growth (Ghost Protocol).
bottomBarDetails.shipEarlyCountdownDesc: A countdown bar sits above this panel while you play. Clear the map before it drains for up to +{{hours}}h of Ship Early overtime: the sooner you finish, the more it pays. The payout drops by one hour at each white tick on the bar. Its windows scale with the number of balls on the map, and only active play counts - pauses, menus and the push prompt don't spend the clock.
bottomBarDetails.shipEarlyWindowActive: Every Ship Early bonus window lasts {{seconds}} extra seconds per ball on the map (Deadline Extension).
bottomBarDetails.shipEarlyMultiplierActive: Ship Early bonuses pay x{{mult}} on this map (Hard Deadline).
bottomBarDetails.shipEarlyMultiplierInactive: Ship Early bonuses pay their normal rate.
bottomBarDetails.scopeCreepImmediateActive: Scope Creep has no grace period on this map: balls start surging in speed from the first second (Hard Deadline).
bottomBarDetails.scopeCreepImmediateInactive: Scope Creep starts after its normal grace period.
bottomBarDetails.ballPathPredictionActive: Draws a predicted trajectory {{bounceText}} ahead for the {{target}}. Helps you time fences to avoid collisions.
bottomBarDetails.noModifiers: No modifiers active yet. Purchase upgrades between levels to gain power-ups for your run.

certificateStore.unlockUpgradeChain: Buy the {{upgradeName}} upgrade in {{required}} different runs.
certificateStore.unlockHoursSpent: Spend {{required}} Certificate Hours in this store (on any certificates).
certificateStore.title: CERTIFICATES
certificateStore.tutorialBody: Unlock permanent bonuses by mastering upgrade families across multiple runs. Each certificate has levels you can purchase with Certificate Hours earned during gameplay.

game.moverTutorialBody:
Orange obstacles move back and forth on a fixed track.

Balls bounce off them - but if your growing fence touches one, you lose a life.

Watch the track lines and time your fences carefully!
game.breakTutorialBody:
Amber blocks can be smashed for bonus overtime - guide balls into them until they shatter, and anything stacked on top falls with them.

You still win the normal way, by shrinking the board; breaking is just extra points.

You can't fence against a breakable (the cut fizzles), and the black ball breaks things in half the hits.
game.creepTutorialBody:
The project has been running too long - the balls just got faster, and they will keep surging every few seconds until they hit a cap.

Scope Creep only punishes waiting: finish the map inside the calm window and you will never see it.

The red gauge in the top bar shows the current surge.
game.topBarTutorialBody:
The top bar is expandable!

Tap it to see full level details, all your active upgrades with descriptions, and certificate-hour progress.
game.bottomBarTutorialBody:
The bottom bar is expandable too!

Tap it to view every active modifier explained in plain language.

interactiveTutorial.dragInstruction: Drag anywhere inside the area to create a slicing wall. Don't let the ball hit the wall while it's growing!

levelComplete.title: Level Complete!

level.title: Level
level.body: The map you just cleared. Later maps pay a higher base overtime and introduce new ball types and mechanics.
level.tip: Keep your run alive to reach deeper, higher-paying maps. Upgrades bought between levels last the whole run.

remaining.title: Remaining Space
remaining.body: How much of the board was still open when you won. You clear a level by fencing off space until the open area drops below the map's target.
remaining.tip: Clearing more than required feeds the Space Bonus, and meeting the target fast pays the Ship Early bonus.

fencesUsed.title: Fences vs Par
fencesUsed.body: How many fences you used against the map's par. At or under par pays the full base overtime. Each fence over par scales it down (x0.75, x0.6, then x0.4), and 3 or more over par also switches off the Space Bonus.
fencesUsed.tip: Favor fewer, bigger cuts. Finishing even one fence under par adds a bonus hour.

spaceBonus.title: Space Bonus
spaceBonus.body: Extra area removed beyond the map's requirement. The ladder pays +1h at 10% extra, +2h at 30% and +3h at 55%. It is disabled if you finish 3 or more fences over par.
spaceBonus.tip: Before your winning cut, squeeze out a little more of the board. Near-total clears pay the top rung.

baseOvertime.title: Base Overtime
baseOvertime.body: The map's fixed payout, scaled by your fence performance. Every map pays a flat base, so the bonuses on this screen are where the real earnings are.
baseOvertime.tip: Stay at or under par to keep the full base, then stack bonuses on top of it.

threadLocks.title: Thread Locks
threadLocks.body: You lock a ball by sealing it into its own small pocket of the board, cut off from everything else. Each locked ball pays its lock value, and tougher ball types pay more. Trapping several balls with a single cut multiplies the whole payout by the number caught: 2 at once pays double, 3 pays triple. Sealing a ball into an extra tight pocket upgrades it to a Superior Lock, which pays double.
threadLocks.tip: Lock a green money ball early: it triples what every later lock this map pays. Then herd balls close together and close one cut around the whole group.

superiorLocks.title: Superior Locks
superiorLocks.body: A Superior Lock is a lock with real craft: the pocket you sealed the ball into was well under half the size that would normally lock it. Superior locks pay double the lock value, and money-ball, frozen and multi-trap multipliers all stack on top.
superiorLocks.tip: Place your sealing cut as close to the ball as you dare. A roomy, lazy pocket only ever earns standard lock value; the tight cage is where the money is.

breakBonus.title: Demolition Bonus
breakBonus.body: Overtime from smashing amber breakable blocks. Balls chip away at a breakable on contact until it shatters, and anything stacked on top falls with it.
breakBonus.tip: Steer balls into breakables with your cuts. The black ball smashes them in half the hits.

shipEarly.title: Ship Early
shipEarly.body: A tempo bonus for meeting the win condition fast: +1h within 60 seconds, +2h within 40, +3h within 25. Only active play counts, menus and the push prompt don't.
shipEarly.tip: Open with big, confident cuts instead of many small safe ones. Speed and precision are separate bonuses, so you can chase both.

pushBonus.title: Push Bonus
pushBonus.body: The push-your-luck reward. After meeting the map's target you can keep cutting instead of banking, and every extra slice of the board pays bonus overtime.
pushBonus.tip: Pushing is free money: if you fail mid-push you only lose the extra bonus, never your banked score.

pickupBonus.title: Power-Up Bonus
pickupBonus.body: Overtime from power-up tokens you sealed in with a lock. A token only pays when a ball locks in the pocket holding it: capture the token's area with no ball and it is wasted, and unclaimed tokens expire on their own.
pickupBonus.tip: Herd a ball toward the token before you seal the pocket. Token overtime is paid after the per-map cap, so it always counts.

overtime.name: Overtime +{{value}}h:
overtime.desc: paid on top of the map's cap.

fork.name: Ball split:
fork.desc: split a ball into more lock income.

freeShopItem.name: Free store item:
freeShopItem.desc: the cheapest offer in your next open store is free.

newHighscore.title: New Highscore
newHighscore.body: You beat this map's previous record, so the whole payout is multiplied by x1.25. It applies after the per-map cap, so breaking a record always pays extra.
newHighscore.tip: Records are kept per map. A strong upgrade build can beat your old scores map after map.

totalBonus.title: Total Bonus
totalBonus.body: All this level's bonuses added together: par, space, locks, demolition, tempo and push.
totalBonus.tip: Bonuses fold under a per-map cap of twice the base payout, so spreading across several bonus types beats maxing out just one.

overtimeEarned.title: Overtime Earned
overtimeEarned.body: What this level paid in total: the scaled base plus all bonuses, capped at twice the map's base payout. A new highscore multiplies past the cap.
overtimeEarned.tip: If you hit the cap often, chase the highscore multiplier: it is applied after the cap, so it always pays.

totalOvertime.title: Total Overtime
totalOvertime.body: Your whole run's overtime so far. It is the currency you spend in the upgrade shop between levels, and what gets banked when the run ends.
totalOvertime.tip: Spending buys power and charges Budget Cycle boons, while a fat bank feeds Runway perks and War Chest. Your build decides which way to lean.

recordPace.title: Record Pace
recordPace.body: Compares your total overtime right now with your best run at the same point (same number of maps completed). Past your best run's end it compares against its final score.
recordPace.tip: Behind pace? Take more risks: lock greedily and push your luck. Ahead? Protect the lead.

levelComplete.newPersonalBest: New personal best, and you are still going!

options.title: OPTIONS
options.resetConfirmBody: This will reset your score balance and all owned certificates. This action cannot be undone.

pushYourLuck.noRisk: No risk - you keep your score if you fail!

result.gameOver: You have been replaced by AI.
result.paceEpitaph: You were ahead of your best run through map {{count}}.

shipEarlyBar.title: Ship Early: clear the map before the bar runs out for bonus overtime

topBarDetails.territoryGoalPending: Capture at least {{required}}% of the board. Currently at {{remaining}}% - need {{more}}% more.
topBarDetails.cutsOverPar_one: Over par by {{count}} cut. Score multiplier is reduced when exceeding par.
topBarDetails.cutsOverPar_other: Over par by {{count}} cuts. Score multiplier is reduced when exceeding par.
topBarDetails.cutsParInfo: Par is {{par}} cuts. Staying within par gives a score bonus.
topBarDetails.cutsRemaining_one: {{count}} cut remaining before par. Great work!
topBarDetails.cutsRemaining_other: {{count}} cuts remaining before par. Great work!
topBarDetails.lockObjectiveMet: Lock objective met! {{locked}} of {{required}} balls locked.
topBarDetails.lockObjectivePending: Lock {{required}} balls by trapping them with fences. {{more}} more needed.
topBarDetails.lockNoneRequiredWithLocks_one: {{count}} ball locked. No lock requirement this level.
topBarDetails.lockNoneRequiredWithLocks_other: {{count}} balls locked. No lock requirement this level.
topBarDetails.lockNoneRequired: No thread lock requirement this level.
topBarDetails.livesDescription: You lose a life when a ball hits your fence while it is growing. Run out of lives and you can spend a Continue to retry the level.
topBarDetails.continuesDescription: Run out of lives and a Continue lets you retry this level with your overtime and upgrades intact. Runs start with none: buy the Golden Parachute upgrade, earn them through certificates, or complete level 20.
topBarDetails.certPointsToGo_one: Complete {{count}} more level to earn the next cert point and unlock upgrades in the Certificate Store.
topBarDetails.certPointsToGo_other: Complete {{count}} more levels to earn the next cert point and unlock upgrades in the Certificate Store.
topBarDetails.ascensionDescription: You looped past the final level. Balls are faster, every drafted mutator below is active, and each completed level counts {{multiplier}}× toward Certificate Hours.
topBarDetails.noUpgrades: No upgrades purchased yet. Visit the upgrade shop between levels to power up your run.

tutorial.achievementsCertificatesBody: Play more to unlock achievements and certificates. Achievements reward lifetime milestones with permanent run bonuses. Certificates are earned by mastering specific upgrades across multiple runs and can be purchased in the Certificate Store for lasting effects.
tutorial.controlSecondFinger: Second finger while fence is growing cancels it

ballTypes.title: Ball Types
ballTypes.intro: A ball's colour tells you what it does. Which balls appear is decided by the level you've reached - new colours unlock as you climb.
ballTypes.notEncounteredYet: Not encountered yet. Lock it for more info.

swipeToCut.title: Swipe to Cut
swipeToCut.description: Swipe or drag to create a slicing wall. Horizontal or vertical based on your swipe direction.

removeEmptySpace.title: Remove Empty Space
removeEmptySpace.description: When the wall completes, the side WITHOUT the ball is removed and becomes darkness.

avoidTheBall.title: Avoid the Ball
avoidTheBall.description: Don't let the ball hit the wall while it's still growing - instant game over!

winCondition.title: Win Condition
winCondition.description: Reduce the arena below the level's target size to win. Trap a ball in a small enough region and it locks away for a bonus!

breakObstacles.title: Breaking Obstacles
breakObstacles.description: Later levels add amber breakable blocks. Guide balls into them to smash them for bonus overtime - stacked pieces fall when their support breaks. You still win by shrinking the board; breaking is extra. You can't fence against a breakable (it fizzles), and the black ball breaks things in half the hits.

lives.title: Lives
lives.description: You start each run with a set number of lives. Lose a life every time a ball hits your growing fence. Run out of lives and the run ends.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoints
checkpoints.description: Every 5 levels is a checkpoint. When your run ends, your next run always restarts from the highest checkpoint you reached - you never lose all your progress.

headStartCertificates.title: Head Start Certificates
headStartCertificates.description: In the Certificate Store you can unlock Head Start certificates that permanently raise your starting level - so experienced players never have to replay early levels.

tutorialOverlay.replayFromOptions: Tutorials can be replayed from OPTIONS

upgradeShop.choicePrompt: Tap to choose one of two options.
upgradeShop.choiceModalHint: Pick one, and only one. It costs 50% more (the price of choosing).
upgradeShop.restocksLeft: Restocks left: {{count}} - buying an item adds a new offer
upgradeShop.runwayTitle: Runway: perks stay active while your bank is above the threshold at map start
upgradeShop.budgetCycleCharged_one: Budget Cycle: spending {{spent}}h charges {{count}} boon for the next map
upgradeShop.budgetCycleCharged_other: Budget Cycle: spending {{spent}}h charges {{count}} boons for the next map
upgradeShop.budgetCycleProgress: Budget Cycle: {{spent}}h of {{next}}h spent toward a next-map boon
upgradeShop.holdHint: Hold an upgrade to see its track
upgradeShop.closedInfoBody:
The store only opens when you lock enough balls during the round: at least one, or two on maps with three or more balls.

Seal balls into pockets to earn your trip to the shop. Lock nothing and you skip straight to the next map.
upgradeShop.tutorialBody: Spend overtime hours on upgrades after each map. Overtime upgrades multiply future earnings. Effects appear in the bottom bar on the next map. Press and hold any upgrade for more info - including what unlocks it and what it unlocks.

runDraft.title: Sprint Planning
runDraft.subtitle: Pick a loadout to shape this run from level 1.
runDraft.pickHint: Each loadout pairs a curse with a blessing. Choose one, or skip to play it straight.

capstoneDraft.title: Promotion
capstoneDraft.subtitle: Your review went well. Pick one permanent perk for the rest of this run.
capstoneDraft.exclusiveHint: One pick only. The other two are gone for good.
capstoneDraft.scopeNote: Applies for the rest of the run, including ascension.
capstoneDraft.holdHint: Hold a perk for the full briefing.

doorDraft.title: Next Assignment
doorDraft.subtitle: Level {{level}} briefing: choose your contract for the next stretch.
doorDraft.scopeNote: This contract runs for the next 5 levels, shops included, until your next assignment.
doorDraft.holdHint: Hold a ticket for the full briefing.

continue.title: Continue?
continue.body_one: Spend 1 Continue to retry this level with your overtime and upgrades intact. {{count}} left.
continue.body_other: Spend 1 Continue to retry this level with your overtime and upgrades intact. {{count}} left.

welcome.certLockedBody:
Certificates are permanent bonuses you earn by mastering upgrade families across multiple runs.

Reach the top tier of an upgrade family, or unlock your first certificate by playing, and this store opens up.

Then spend Certificate Hours (earned every 5 levels you complete) to level certificates up for lasting effects.

loadouts.title: Loadouts
loadouts.unlockRequirement_one: Win with {{count}} more unique loadout to unlock.
loadouts.unlockRequirement_other: Win with {{count}} more unique loadouts to unlock.
loadouts.unlockedModalBody: You won your first run! From now on, every run starts with a loadout: a curse bundled with a blessing that shapes the whole run. Win with different loadouts to unlock more.

hallOfFame.title: Performance Review
hallOfFame.emptyLadder: No runs banked yet. Finish a run and it lands here.
